message:
Improve WASI filesystem access and file write error handling

Changes:
- Add more preopened directories (., /tmp, HOME, /) for broader file access
- Improve nativeFsWrite to auto-create parent directories
- Try absolute path fallback when relative path fails
- Better error messages (EACCES, ENOENT)

Note: Claude CLI -p command still doesn't fully work due to networking
limitations. The WASM environment lacks proper HTTP support because:
- WasmEdge socket extensions require plugins not installed
- Axios can't find suitable adapter (xhr/http/fetch all unavailable)
- Our fetch polyfill uses WASI sockets which aren't available

The --version command works. For full -p functionality, either:
1. Install WasmEdge socket plugin for networking
2. Or use native CLI instead of WASM version
